title: aspalathus subtingens
intro: Aspalathus subtingens, also known as the Rooibos leaf or Caffeine-free tea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to South Africa. The leaves of Aspalathus subtingens have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aspalathus subtingens include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Aspalathus subtingens is often prepared as a herbal tea, either on its own or in combination with other herbs, and can also be found in supplement form.
